---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new check, integration, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the gap or pain point this feature addresses.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see implemented.

**Component**
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Contract
- [ ] Docs

**Complexity estimate (maintainer will confirm)**
- [ ] Trivial — small, self-contained change
- [ ] Medium — touches one component, may need design discussion
- [ ] High — multi-component or architectural change

**Additional context**
Links, references, or examples from other projects.
